jd_text: Director of Support Services ( UAEN Only ) Job Purpose: To lead and oversee all support service functions including Human Resources, Finance, Procurement, IT, and General Services, ensuring efficient operations, compliance, and alignment with organizational strategy. Key Responsibilities: Lead and manage all support services functions (HR, Finance, Procurement, IT, and Facilities/General Services). Develop and implement strategies to improve operational efficiency and service delivery. Oversee budgeting, financial planning, and cost control across departments. Ensure compliance with government regulations, policies, and internal procedures. Drive digital transformation and process improvement initiatives. Manage vendor relationships, contracts, and procurement processes. Oversee facilities management, including maintenance, security, and logistics. Lead workforce planning, recruitment strategy, and employee services in coordination with HR. Provide regular reports and insights to senior management on performance and risks. Build and lead high-performing teams across all support functions. Qualifications & Experience: Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration, Management, Finance, or related field (Master’s preferred). Minimum 12–15 years of experience, with at least 5 years in a leadership role. Strong experience managing multiple functions (HR, Finance, Procurement, IT, Facilities). Experience in government or semi-government entities is preferred. Skills & Competencies: Strong leadership and strategic thinking Stakeholder management Financial and operational management Governance and compliance Change management and transformation Communication and decision-making skills
